query:
SELECT eda.id as alert_id, eda.epiDeliveryId, eda.epi_nome, eda.valor_total, eda.status, eda.employeeId,
       CASE WHEN ed.id IS NULL THEN 'ENTREGA NAO EXISTE' WHEN ed.deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 'ENTREGA EXCLUIDA' ELSE 'ENTREGA ATIVA' END as status_entrega
FROM epi_discount_alerts eda
LEFT JOIN epi_deliveries ed ON eda.epiDeliveryId = ed.id
WHERE eda.status = 'pendente';

FROM epi_discount_alerts eda
LEFT JOIN epi_deliveries ed ON eda.epiDeliveryId = ed.id
